_meta.purpose: Closing sentences. The last thing the reader sees. Should feel like a natural ending — recommendation, plan to return, or simple sign-off.
rules: Must feel like the person is wrapping up naturally
Recommendations should feel organic not salesy
Some outros are just one short sentence — that's fine
Don't end every review with a recommendation — mix it up
